select.isEqual: SELECT A.ContainerID , B.ContainerTypeName$lang$ ContainerTypeName, B.ContainerTypeID FROM tbContainer A JOIN tbContainerType B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.ContainerTypeID = B.ContainerTypeID JOIN tbContainerUseDep C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.ContainerID = C.ContainerID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND C.UseDepID = #myDeptID# AND A.ContainerOwnDepID = #useDeptID# ORDER BY B.ContainerTypeID

SELECT A.ContainerID , B.ContainerTypeName$lang$ ContainerTypeName, B.ContainerTypeID , A.ContainerOwnDepID FROM tbContainer A JOIN tbContainerType B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.ContainerTypeID = B.ContainerTypeID JOIN tbContainerUseDep C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.ContainerID = C.ContainerID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND C.UseDepID = #myDeptID# AND A.ContainerOwnDepID <> #myDeptID# ORDER BY A.ContainerOwnDepID, B.ContainerTypeID

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ContainerID , B.ContainerTypeName$lang$ ContainerTypeName , B.ContainerTypeID FROM tbContainer A, tbContainerType B WHERE A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.ContainerTypeID = B.ContainerTypeID AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.ContainerOwnDepID = #myDeptID# ORDER BY B.ContainerTypeID

SELECT B.ItemCode ,
D.itemname itemname
D.itemname itemname2
FROM TBENDAPRDOCINFO A JOIN TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.DocID = B.DocID JOIN tbContainer C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.ContainerID = C.ContainerID JOIN TBDOCNUM_ITEM D ON B.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND B.ItemCode = D.itemcode WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.DelFlag IS NULL AND ( B.ItemCode IS NOT NULL ) AND ( B.ItemCode <> '' ) AND ( A.ContainerID IN ( SELECT F.ContainerID FROM tbContainer F LEFT JOIN tbContainerUseDep E ON F.tenant_id = E.tenant_id AND F.ContainerID = E.ContainerID WHERE F.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ( F.ContainerOwnDepID = #deptID# ) OR ( E.UseDepID = #deptID# ) ) )
GROUP BY B.ItemCode, D.itemname
GROUP BY B.ItemCode, D.itemname2
ORDER BY B.ItemCode
SELECT USERCONTID , USERCONTNAME , DESCRIPTION FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #parentContID# AND OWNUSERID = #userID# ORDER BY USERCONTNAME
SELECT DEPTCONTID , DEPTCONTNAME , DESCRIPTION , SN , MANAGEUSERID FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #parentContID# AND OWNDEPTID = #deptID# ORDER BY SN, DEPTCONTNAME
SELECT count(*) FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #userID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #deptContID#

SELECT CONTAINERID FROM TBCONTAINER A INNER JOIN TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.CONTAINERTYPEID = B.CONTAINERTYPEID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.DOCUMENTSTATE IN (#staDSPumYui#, #staDSBalSin#) AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptID#

SELECT CONTAINERID FROM tbContainer A JOIN TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.ContainerTypeID = B.ContainerTypeID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.DocumentState = #staDSBansong# AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptID#
SELECT DEPTID , CONTTYPE , SN , CONTNAME , SUBQUERY FROM TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEPTID = #deptID# ORDER BY CONTTYPE, SN
SELECT ISUSE FROM TBCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #code1# AND CODE2 = #code2#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(usercontid), '0000000000') + 1 FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBUSERCONT ( USERCONTID, USERCONTNAME, PARENTCONTID, DESCRIPTION, OWNUSERID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxContainerID#, #userContName#, #parentContID#, #description#, #userID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT NVL(MAX(deptcontid), '0000000000') + 1 FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBDEPTCONT ( DEPTCONTID, DEPTCONTNAME, PARENTCONTID, SN, DESCRIPTION, OWNDEPTID, MANAGEUSERID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxContainerID#, #deptContName#, #parentContID#, #sn#, #description#, #deptID#, #manageUserID#, #tenantID# )
